distance_km.note: Multiple sources confirm the Ozbaldy race includes a 50km distance option. Source [2] lists 'Per Johnsen Memorial Ozbaldy 50k & 10k Freestyle' and source [4] confirms '(50km/10km freestyle)'

elevation_m.note: No web sources in search results provide elevation gain data for the Ozbaldy race. Cannot confirm or deny the 350m claim.

country.note: Multiple sources confirm the race takes place in the United States. Source [6] and [7] specify 'Cabin Creek Road, WA, United States'

region_state_province.note: All sources consistently identify Washington state as the location. Source [2] specifies 'Cabin Creek, WA' and source [5] refers to it as 'western Washington's only XC ski marathon'

discipline.note: Sources consistently identify the race as freestyle, not skate. Source [2] lists 'Per Johnsen Memorial Ozbaldy 50k & 10k Freestyle' and source [4] confirms '(50km/10km freestyle)'

typical_participants.note: Source [8] reports 151 racers participated in the 2025 Per Johnsen Memorial Ozbaldy Freestyle event, which exceeds the claimed 50 participants by more than 20%

year_founded.note: No web sources provide information about when the Per Johnsen Memorial Ozbaldy race was first established. Cannot confirm or deny.

official_website_url.note: Source [5] shows the official Kongsberger Ski Club website for Ozbaldy 2026 is at kongsbergers.org, not kongsbergerskiclub.org as claimed

typical_race_date.note: Multiple sources confirm the race occurs in March, not February. Source [2] lists 'March 2, 2025 - Per Johnsen Memorial Ozbaldy 50k & 10k Freestyle' and source [7] shows 'Race started: Sunday, March 2, 2025'
